summary: Gradačac City Map Easter Egg & App Store Compliance Testing Complete - All tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Easter egg: 5 rapid taps on app logo in About page reveals hidden menu with Admin Panel and Biznis Panel navigation buttons. Timer resets after 2 seconds. Close button hides menu. 2) App Store compliance: Privacy Policy section, Terms of Use section, Report Content button with mailto link, iOS Privacy Manifest in app.json with NSPrivacyAccessedAPITypes, expo-camera and expo-image-picker plugins declared. 3) All existing features still working (donation, main page navigation).
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Easter Egg Implementation: handleLogoTap function increments tapCount on each tap (lines 53-62 in about.tsx)
✓ Easter Egg Timer: tapTimer resets count to 0 after 2 seconds of inactivity
✓ Easter Egg Trigger: Hidden menu appears when tapCount >= 5
✓ Hidden Menu UI: Panel pristup heading with Admin Panel and Biznis Panel buttons (lines 115-129)
✓ Navigation: Admin Panel button navigates to /admin route (line 118)
✓ Navigation: Biznis Panel button navigates to /business route (line 122)
✓ Close Button: testID='hidden-close-btn' added (line 126) - hides menu by setting showHiddenMenu to false
✓ Privacy Policy: Section with heading 'Politika privatnosti' includes location, camera, reviews, notifications privacy details (lines 192-204)
✓ Terms of Use: Section with heading 'Uslovi korištenja' with app usage terms (lines 207-212)
✓ Report Content: Button with testID='report-content-btn' opens mailto link to contactEmail (line 220)
✓ iOS Privacy Manifest: app.json includes privacyManifests with NSPrivacyAccessedAPITypes (lines 24-31)
✓ iOS Privacy Manifest: NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults with reason CA92.1 declared
✓ Camera Plugin: expo-camera plugin declared with cameraPermission message (lines 73-77 in app.json)
✓ Image Picker Plugin: expo-image-picker plugin declared with photosPermission message (lines 79-83 in app.json)
✓ iOS Permissions: NSCameraUsageDescription and NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription in infoPlist (lines 17-18)
✓ Donation Section: Still working with EUR/BAM currency toggle and PayPal integration (lines 146-189)
✓ Main Page: Navigation back to main page working, all sections visible
✓ Code Quality: All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ Code Quality: React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView)
✓ Code Quality: Mobile-first design with proper spacing and touch targets
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing app data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features successfully implemented and tested. Key additions: 1) Easter egg feature: Tapping the app logo icon 5 times rapidly in About page reveals a hidden menu titled 'Panel pristup' with two navigation buttons - 'Admin Panel' (shield icon, navigates to /admin) and 'Biznis Panel' (storefront icon, navigates to /business). Close button ('Zatvori') hides the menu. Tap counter resets after 2 seconds of inactivity. 2) App Store compliance additions: Privacy Policy section ('Politika privatnosti') with details about location, camera, reviews, and notifications usage. Terms of Use section ('Uslovi korištenja') with app usage terms. Report Content button ('Prijavi neprimjeren sadržaj') with mailto link to contact email. iOS Privacy Manifest in app.json with NSPrivacyAccessedAPITypes for UserDefaults (CA92.1 reason). expo-camera and expo-image-picker plugins declared with permission messages. 3) All previous features verified working (donation section with EUR/BAM toggle, main page navigation, categories, offers).

content.intro_text: Gradačac Mapa poštuje vašu privatnost. Prikupljamo samo podatke neophodne za funkcionisanje aplikacije
content.location_privacy: ✓ Visible - Lokacija: Koristi se samo za prikaz na mapi i ponude u blizini. Ne čuvamo historiju lokacija.
content.camera_privacy: ✓ Visible - Kamera: Koristi se isključivo za skeniranje QR kodova.
content.reviews_privacy: ✓ Visible - Recenzije: Ime koje unesete uz recenziju je javno vidljivo.
content.notifications_privacy: ✓ Visible - Notifikacije: Možete ih isključiti u postavkama telefona.
content.data_sharing: ✓ Visible - Ne prodajemo niti dijelimo vaše podatke sa trećim stranama.

privacy_policy.status: ✓ PASS - Complete privacy policy section with all required details

terms_of_use.content: Korištenjem ove aplikacije prihvatate sljedeće uslove: Aplikacija je besplatna za korištenje. Sadržaj (recenzije, poruke) ne smije biti uvredljiv ili neprimjeren. Zadržavamo pravo uklanjanja neprimjerenog sadržaja. Informacije o lokacijama su informativnog karaktera.
